title: Catch Policy, Injected Randomness, Immutable Collection State, and Updates · Type-System Trace: Pokedex Ts Collection Key
summary: Catch calls Math.random inside the handler, mutates a Map in shared state, stores transport objects, accepts duplicate names with different casing, and cannot replay outcomes. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts collection key increment in replayable immutable Pokemon collection reducer. Learners progress through prediction,…
objectives: Key entries by validated resolved ID and retain canonical name, detail view, catch evidence, and schema version.

Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
